global_description: A small, compact bird with a short tail and a large head. It has a striking green plumage on its back and wings, contrasted by a white belly and throat. The bird features a long, pointed black bill and a distinctive white collar around its neck. Its wings are short and rounded, and it has a glossy, iridescent sheen.
discriminative_attributes: Green plumage on back and wings

part_details.head: Large, rounded with a white throat and a green crown.
part_details.bill: Long, pointed, and black, ideal for fishing.
part_details.wings: Short, rounded, and covered in green feathers.
part_details.tail: Short and squared, green with white tips.

spatial_relations: The bill extends forward from the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The tail is positioned at the rear of the body.
